bullish: Price is above the 20 EMA on the 4H
bearish: Price is below the 20 EMA on the 4H
neutral: Price is chopping around the 20 EMA

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
No trading in the first 15 minutes of the NY session open
If I have 2 losing trades in a row, stop for the day

meta.title: Elite BTC Trader Strategy Rules
meta.description: Publicly documented strategies, indicators and rules from 5 top Bitcoin traders

btc_live_snapshot.note: Price below all major EMAs. Death cross active. Wait for reversal confirmation.

traders.name: Michaël van de Poppe

golden_pocket.description: Primary buy zone on pullbacks in uptrend

rsi.usage: Momentum filter. Entry when RSI 40-60 at Golden Pocket. Bullish divergence on 4H = confirmation.

macd.usage: Secondary confirmation only. Bullish crossover confirms long bias.

entry_rules: Price retraces into 0.618-0.65 Fibonacci Golden Pocket
Golden Pocket aligns with EMA 21 or EMA 50 (confluence)
Bullish reversal candle at zone (engulfing, hammer, or pin bar)
RSI between 40-60 at entry (not deeply oversold = not a knife catch)
exit_rules: Scale out 50% at 0.786 recovery and prior swing high
Scale out another portion at Fib 1.272 extension
Let final portion run to 1.618 extension

stop_loss.logic: A confirmed close below 0.786 fully invalidates the retracement setup

key_rules_summary: EMA 200 weekly = macro bull/bear dividing line
Golden Pocket (0.618-0.65) is the ONLY high-probability buy zone
Never buy into falling RSI below 30 — that is a breakdown, not a correction
Trail stop to EMA 21 once in significant profit

traders.name: Scott Melker
traders.philosophy: Less is more. TA is a risk management tool, not a crystal ball. Every trade needs a clean invalidation before entry.

rsi.primary_usage: DIVERGENCE — bullish divergence at support = primary entry signal
rsi.key_rule: RSI divergence at a pre-identified support zone is his highest-conviction setup

macd.usage: Secondary direction confirmation. Not a primary entry trigger.

support_resistance.rule: Fibonacci levels are ONLY actionable when they align with horizontal S/R — pure confluence

entry_rules: Price reaches pre-identified horizontal support zone
RSI divergence present at that support (price lower low, RSI higher low)
Price is above EMA 200 for any long setup
Clean stop-loss invalidation level must be identifiable BEFORE entry — if you can't identify the stop, don't trade
exit_rules: Prior swing high or horizontal resistance = TP1
Scale out at each resistance zone — never try to pick the exact top

stop_loss.placement: Just below the support zone / below the swing low that defines the trade
stop_loss.philosophy: The 'clean invalidation' is non-negotiable. If no clean stop exists, skip the trade.

key_rules_summary: EMA 200 daily = the only line that matters for macro bias
RSI divergence at structure = highest-conviction entry
No clean invalidation level = no trade
50/200 EMA Golden Cross on daily = major bull signal
50/200 EMA Death Cross on daily = move to cash or short

traders.name: Crypto Face

vwap.role: PRIMARY directional anchor — most important indicator in his toolkit
rules: Price above VWAP = bullish intraday bias — only look for LONGS
Price below VWAP = bearish intraday bias — only look for SHORTS
VWAP = the mean-reversion target and dynamic S/R level
Do NOT take a long if price is significantly below VWAP
Volume spike on VWAP breakout = valid breakout
Low volume on VWAP retest = weak signal — avoid
Volume dry-up during consolidation = compression before move

rsi.usage: Momentum filter. Long when RSI pulls back to 40-50. Short when RSI rises to 50-60 and rolls over.

macd.usage: Histogram direction confirms trade bias. Positive and rising = long. Negative and falling = short.

long: Price pulls back to VWAP from above (uptrend session)
9 EMA is above 21 EMA (confirming bullish momentum)
Volume contracts on the pullback (healthy retest, not breakdown)
Bullish reversal candle forms at VWAP
short: Price bounces up to VWAP from below (downtrend session)
RSI rises to 50-60 and rolls over

exit_rules: Opposite VWAP standard deviation band = TP target
Scale 50% at first resistance, trail remainder

stop_loss.placement: Below VWAP for longs; above VWAP for shorts. 0.5-1% below entry candle low.
stop_loss.invalidation: Clean close back through VWAP in wrong direction = immediate exit

key_rules_summary: VWAP position determines trade direction for the entire session
9/21 EMA crossover on 5m = primary momentum signal
Volume must confirm the move — no volume = no trade
Minimum 2:1 R:R on every scalp

traders.name: Tone Vays
traders.background: Former Wall Street derivatives trader (Bear Stearns, JP Morgan)
traders.important_note: Tone Vays is NOT a day trader. He trades multi-week to multi-month swings on weekly charts.

td_sequential.name: TI Indicator (Time Indicator) — custom built, inspired by Tom DeMark TD Sequential
td_sequential.setup_count: 9 consecutive closes. Setup 9 = potential reversal zone.
td_sequential.countdown: After Setup 9, Countdown 1-13 begins. Countdown 13 = full exhaustion, high-probability reversal.
td_sequential.perfected_9: Bar 8 or 9 closes at/beyond prior high (buy setup) = stronger signal
td_sequential.rule: TD9/Countdown13 does NOT mean blindly trade. Used within a confluence framework.

rules: Bullish divergence (price lower low, RSI higher low) + TD Countdown 13 = max conviction long
Bearish divergence (price higher high, RSI lower high) + TD9 = max conviction short/exit
RSI at 40-60 normal levels with MACD confluence = buying opportunity

macd.usage: DIVERGENCE co-indicator. MACD + RSI BOTH showing divergence = 'very powerful message'
macd.key_rule: MACD and RSI divergence together = highest conviction signal

chaikin_money_flow.role: Third primary indicator alongside RSI and MACD
rules: CMF crossing above zero = bullish money flow confirmation
CMF below zero = selling pressure active
CMF above zero + RSI bullish + MACD bullish = 'super bullish confluence'

ichimoku.reason: Tone Vays explicitly does NOT use Ichimoku — describes it as 'too convoluted'

entry_rules_high_conviction_long: TD Sequential Countdown 13 reached on WEEKLY chart
CMF crossing above zero or rising toward zero from below
All four signals aligning = MAXIMUM conviction long
entry_rules_partial_signal: TD9 + RSI divergence alone = lower confidence trade (still valid)
Each additional confluence indicator adds conviction
exit_rules: Opposing TD Sequential setup appears (TD9 on the upside)
RSI divergence appears at the profit side
CMF begins declining below zero after a strong run

stop_loss.placement: Below the swing low that triggered the TD Sequential signal
stop_loss.philosophy: If TD Sequential signal fails (price continues past invalidation), setup is wrong — exit immediately

key_rules_summary: Weekly chart only — daily secondary
TD Countdown 13 = primary reversal signal
RSI + MACD + CMF divergence = highest conviction stack
Never use Ichimoku
Be patient — waits weeks/months for the perfect setup

traders.name: Credible Crypto

elliott_wave.description: Elliott Wave Theory is the FOUNDATION of his entire methodology
wave_rules: Wave 2 cannot retrace below the start of Wave 1 (hard invalidation rule)
Wave 3 cannot be the shortest impulse wave
Wave 4 cannot enter Wave 1 price territory

tradeable_waves.wave_2: Best risk/reward entry — buy the Wave 2 correction for Wave 3 ride
tradeable_waves.wave_4: Secondary entry — shallower correction, smaller move target
tradeable_waves.wave_3: Most powerful wave — highest volume, RSI above 50

fibonacci.integration: Used to MEASURE and VALIDATE Elliott Wave levels
fibonacci.key_rule: Enter Wave 2 correction in the 0.5-0.618 Fib zone with stop below Wave 1 origin

wave_integration.wave_3: RSI reaches 70+ and stays above 50 — confirms Wave 3 is genuine
wave_integration.wave_5_top: RSI bearish divergence at Wave 5 high = EXIT signal
wave_integration.wave_2_4: RSI drops to 40-55 — normal correction, not breakdown
wave_integration.key_rule: RSI bearish divergence on Wave 5 = close the long

wave_rules: Wave 3 must have the HIGHEST volume of any impulse wave
Declining volume on Wave 5 (while price makes new high) = exhaustion warning
Volume expands on breakout from Wave 2/4 consolidation = confirms new impulse

macd.usage: Secondary confirmation. Positive during impulse waves, flat/negative during corrections.

entry_rules_wave_2_long: Identify completed Wave 1 impulse (5 sub-waves visible)
Price retraces to 0.5-0.618 Fibonacci zone of Wave 1
Zone aligns with prior Wave 1 high as support
RSI normalizes to 40-55 range (healthy correction, not breakdown)
Bullish reversal candle at Fibonacci zone

stop_loss.wave_2_trade: Below the origin point of Wave 1 — any close below fully invalidates the EWT structure
stop_loss.wave_4_trade: Below the top of Wave 1 (Wave 4 cannot enter Wave 1 territory)
stop_loss.philosophy: Stop placement is RULE-BASED per Elliott Wave rules, NOT a percentage. This defines the risk.

exit_rules: RSI bearish divergence at projected Wave 5 / Wave C target zone = close
Price hits Fibonacci extension targets (1.618 for Wave 3, 0.618-1.0 for Wave 5)
If wave count is INVALIDATED by a rule violation — exit immediately regardless of P&L
key_rules_summary: Elliott Wave + Fibonacci is the entire system
Wave 2 retracement to 0.5-0.618 = best entry zone
Wave 3 = highest volume, RSI above 50 — ride it
Wave 5 RSI divergence = exit signal
EWT rule violations are HARD stops — no exceptions

composite_confluence.description: Signals that appear across 3+ traders simultaneously — highest conviction setups

rsi.note: Every trader uses standard 14-period RSI with 70/30 thresholds

macd.note: Every trader uses standard MACD settings — no custom parameters documented

fib_618.note: 0.618 Fibonacci level is referenced by ALL five traders as key support/resistance

highest_conviction_long_checklist: Price above EMA 200 (Melker + van de Poppe)
Price in Fibonacci Golden Pocket 0.618-0.65 (van de Poppe)
RSI bullish divergence (Melker + Tone Vays + Credible Crypto)
TD Sequential buy count approaching 9 on daily (Tone Vays)
CMF rising toward / crossing above zero (Tone Vays)
Elliott Wave 2 or 4 correction completing at Fib zone (Credible Crypto)
Volume contracting on pullback then expanding on reversal (Crypto Face + Credible Crypto)
